description: Long, dense journal paragraph: one named person, a project, times, many topics and two tasks (English).
text: Long day. Met with the investors this afternoon — Rachel and a couple of others — and they liked the traction. Still, we need to tighten the financial model and send the updated pitch deck to Rachel by Friday. Also, the Nimbus integration is behind schedule.

tasks.label: send the updated pitch deck to Rachel by Friday

connections.source: send the updated pitch deck to Rachel by Friday
